chat_template_excerpt:
{% for message in messages %}{% if message['role'] == 'user' %}<|user|>
{content}+eos_token{% elif message['role'] == 'system' %}<|system|>
{content}+eos_token{% elif message['role'] == 'assistant' %}<|assistant|>
{content}+eos_token{% endif %}{% if loop.last and add_generation_prompt %}<|assistant|>{% endif %}{% endfor %}  (Zephyr/TinyLlama-style; eos_token=</s> id2; system+user+assistant branches, no tool branch)

claimed_envelope.model_evidence: Model-agnostic decoder/API: n>1 independent generations served by sampler loop; OpenAI-shape contract, arch=llama imposes no limit.
stream_options.include_usage terminal chunk is an API-shape concern, independent of arch=llama; usage accounting available for any causal LM.

claimed_envelope.capability: max_tokens, stop sequences, EOS stop behavior
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: EOS stop well-defined: tokenizer.ggml.eos_token_id=2 (verified in metadata); max_tokens/stop-sequences are decoder-side contract behaviors.
top_p/top_k/min_p/temperature/penalties/logit_bias are sampler invariants over the logit vector, model-agnostic for any causal LM.

claimed_envelope.capability: fixed seed reproduces token-for-token across runs
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: Fixed-seed token-for-token reproducibility is an RNG invariant of the sampler; holds for arch=llama Q8_0 deterministic decode.
Logits exposed by the causal LM head; top_logprobs at temp=0 deterministically parity-checkable for arch=llama.

claimed_envelope.capability: system role + multi-turn template fidelity (per THIS template)
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: VERIFIED in tokenizer.chat_template metadata: explicit `{% elif message['role'] == 'system' %}` -> '<|system|>\n'+content+eos_token branch, plus user '<|user|>' and assistant '<|assistant|>' branches, plus `loop.last and add_generation_prompt` -> '<|assistant|>'. Multi-turn supported (for-loop over all messages).

claimed_envelope.capability: native tool/function calling — REQUIRES tool-call branch or tool/ipython control tokens in THIS model template
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: VERIFIED: chat_template has ONLY user/system/assistant role branches; no tool/tool_calls branch, and tokenizer has no tool/ipython/function control tokens. True n/a, not a gap.

claimed_envelope.capability: JSON mode + GBNF grammar-constrained decode (decoder-side, model-agnostic)
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: JSON mode + GBNF grammar-constrained decode is decoder-side (logit masking), model-agnostic; arch=llama imposes no constraint.

claimed_envelope.capability: full TRAINED context length, exact value from metadata
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: VERIFIED: llama.context_length=2048 read directly from GGUF metadata (exact trained length).

claimed_envelope.capability: RoPE scaling/extension — REQUIRES a rope scaling type/factor declared in metadata
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: VERIFIED across all 23 metadata keys: only llama.rope.freq_base=10000.0 + llama.rope.dimension_count=64 present; NO rope.scaling.type/factor/original_context_length keys. RoPE scaling ABSENT -> correct n/a.

claimed_envelope.capability: prompt/completion/total token accounting + optional timing fields
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: prompt/completion/total token counts + optional timing are API-shape accounting, independent of arch=llama.

claimed_envelope.capability: (SECONDARY) loadability across additional quants beyond Q8_0
claimed_envelope.model_evidence: SECONDARY (loader fact, no behavioral oracle): general.file_type=7 (Q8_0); any llama GGUF supports other quants — widens the load matrix, not the behavioral envelope. capable+none is an intentional secondary annotation, not a behavioral parity claim.

overclaim_flags: NO VERDICT FLIPS REQUIRED — adversarial re-inspect confirms the draft. All three especially-flagged caps verified against live GGUF metadata.

VERIFIED chat.system_multiturn=capable: tokenizer.chat_template metadata contains explicit system branch (message['role']=='system' -> <|system|>) alongside user/assistant branches and add_generation_prompt -> <|assistant|>. Specific template branch present, so capable holds (not flipped).

VERIFIED tools.function_calling=incapable: re-read chat_template has only user/system/assistant branches; no tool/tool_calls branch and no tool/ipython/function control token in tokenizer.ggml.tokens. Stricter verdict (incapable/none) is correct as a true n/a, not an underclaim.

VERIFIED context.rope_scaling=incapable: enumerated all 23 metadata keys — only llama.rope.freq_base=10000.0 and llama.rope.dimension_count=64 exist; rope.scaling.type/factor and original_context_length are absent. Scaling genuinely absent -> incapable correct (no underclaim; runtime extension is not a model-declared capability).
VERIFIED context.full_length=2048: llama.context_length re-read = 2048 (exact trained length from metadata).

NOTE (no change): load.quant_breadth carries verdict=capable with oracle_class=none, which is internally unusual; left unchanged because it is explicitly a SECONDARY loader-matrix fact with no behavioral oracle, consistent with the conductor table.

NOTE (no change): arch.special_tokens lists <|system|>/<|user|>/<|assistant|> which are template control STRINGS (tokenized as ordinary sub-tokens), plus real bos/eos <s>/</s>. Kept as the chat-protocol control markers; only <s> (id1) and </s> (id2) are true vocab special tokens.
phase0_notes: Adversarial Phase 0 re-verification of tinyllama-1.1b-chat-q8_0 via `camelid inspect` (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=-1). Ground truth is GGUF metadata only (23 keys total). Confirmed: general.architecture=llama; general.file_type=7 (Q8_0); block_count=22; head_count=32, head_count_kv=4 (GQA 8:1); embedding_length=2048; feed_forward_length=5632; layer_norm_rms_epsilon=1e-5. Context: llama.context_length=2048 EXACT. RoPE: freq_base=10000.0, dimension_count=64 (=2048/32 head_dim); NO scaling keys among the 23 -> context.rope_scaling incapable is CORRECT. Tokens: bos=1, eos=2, pad=2, unk=0. chat_template = TinyLlama/Zephyr style with system+user+assistant branches and add_generation_prompt -> <|assistant|>; NO tool/function branch or tool/ipython tokens -> tools.function_calling incapable is CORRECT (true n/a). chat.system_multiturn capable is CORRECT (explicit system branch present). Result of adversarial pass: the draft envelope is accurate; zero overclaims and zero underclaims found; no verdicts flipped. Two no-change annotations recorded (load.quant_breadth capable+none secondary pairing; special_tokens control-string vs true-special-token distinction).
